headline: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) Shares Slide on Q2 Earnings Miss
summary: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) reported a significant Q2 2026 earnings miss, with revenue of $3.154B and EPS of $0.59 falling short of estimates. Shares dropped 6.7% in after-hours trading.
